articles.description: Scientists have spent decades studying octopuses, but these mysterious creatures continue to surprise them. Every discovery seems to answer one question while raising another. Here are five facts that make the octopus one of the most extraordinary animals on the planet.

articles.title: Aamir Khan's 'Lagaan' 25-year celebration to kick off IFFM 2026
articles.description: Aamir Khan will attend a special screening of his film Lagaan in Melbourne on July 9 to mark its 25th anniversary. The event will launch the 17th edition of the Indian Film Festival of Melbourne (IFFM) as a special curtain-raiser event.

articles.title: Taylor Swift-Travis Kelce wedding schedule CONFIRMED
articles.description: American royalty Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce are reportedly set to tie the knot on July 3, 2026, at New York's Madison Square Garden. The two-day celebration kicks off with a rehearsal dinner for 100 guests on July 2nd. The main event on the 3rd will see 1000 guests witness their vows at 5:30 p.m., followed by a grand reception until 2:00 a.m.

articles.title: Ahead Of Alpha Release, A Look At Alia Bhatt’s Notable Performances

articles.title: Musafir Cafe OTT Release: When And Where To Watch Vikrant Massey’s Romantic Drama?
articles.description:
Vikrant Massey is set to headline Musafir Cafe, a romantic drama that has been generating considerable buzz. However, unlike a traditional theatrical release, the film will premiere directly on OTT. The latest update has now confirmed when audiences will be able to watch it online. He was last seen in a cameo appearance in O'Romeo, where his performance received a warm response from viewers.

When And Where To Watch Musafir Cafe

Musafir Cafe will begin streaming on Netflix from July 24. The film has been created by Sharanya Rajgopal and directed by Ruchir Arun. It is based on Divya Prakash Dubey’s novel Musafir Cafe.

ALSO READ | Setback For Mani Ratnam And Vijay Sethupathi? Untitled Film’s OTT Rights Reportedly Sold For Just Rs 20 Cr

The film stars Vikrant Massey, Vedika Pinto and Mahima Makwana in the lead roles. The supporting cast includes Adil Hussain, Rajeev Siddhartha, Anubha Fatehpuria, Lovleen Mishra and Sadia Siddiqui. The project has been produced by Terribly Tiny Tales.

View this post on Instagram

A post shared by Netflix India (@netflix_in)

Romantic Drama Set Between Bhopal And Mussoorie

Musafir Cafe is a romantic drama whose story unfolds between Bhopal and Mussoorie. At the heart of the narrative is a café named Musafir Cafe, run by Chander. Vikrant Massey plays Chander, while Vedika Pinto stars as Sudha, his girlfriend. Mahima Makwana appears as Preeti.

The makers have already unveiled the film’s first-look teaser, which has received an enthusiastic response from fans.

Vikrant Massey’s Upcoming Projects

On the work front, Vikrant Massey was recently seen in Aankhon Ki Gustakhiyan. He also made a cameo appearance in Shahid Kapoor’s O'Romeo. Looking ahead, he will feature in Talaakhon Mein Ek, which is currently in post-production. He is also part of Yaar Jigri, another project that is in the post-production stage.

ALSO READ | Karisma Kapoor Leases Out Luxury Mumbai Apartment, Set To Earn Rs 5.51 Lakh A Month

Vikrant is widely recognised for his acclaimed performance in 12th Fail, where he portrayed Manoj Kumar Sharma. His performance in the film earned widespread praise from both audiences and critics.

articles.title: Uorfi Javed visits Kamakhya Temple days after denying religious conversion rumours
articles.description: Just days after denying claims of converting to Hinduism, Uorfi Javed shared photos from her visit to Guwahati's Kamakhya Devi temple, dressed traditionally with vermilion on her forehead. The visit follows a heated social media exchange where she denied changing her name or religion.

articles.title: JJ Abrams explains what sets 'The End of Oak Street' apart from 'Jurassic Park': 'People are hungry for new stories'
articles.description: Hollywood is set to unveil a fresh take on the dinosaur genre with 'The End of Oak Street,' hitting screens in August. Producer JJ Abrams highlights the film's unique suburban setting, contrasting everyday life with prehistoric creatures. Directed by David Robert Mitchell, the thriller follows a family whose neighborhood is mysteriously transported, forcing them to unite for survival. The film promises an original experience for audiences craving new stories.

articles.title: Sara Foster on David Foster and Katharine McPhee’s age difference
articles.description: Sara Foster wholeheartedly backs her father, David Foster, in his marriage to Katharine McPhee, pushing aside any doubts about their 35-year age difference. She praised McPhee for being 'amazing' and emphasized their incredible connection. Additionally, she noted how gracefully McPhee embraces her role as a stepmother after their seven years together, which began when they met on the set of 'American Idol'.

articles.title: What's Happening With Sam Altman's Biopic? | TechPulse
articles.description: Amazon reportedly dropped Artificial, a $40 million film directed by Luca Guadagnino (Call Me by Your Name, Challengers) and starring Andrew Garfield as Sam Altman, Ike Barinholtz as Elon Musk, Cooper Koch as Ilya Sutskever and Yura Borisov as OpenAI co-founder Ilya Sutskever's colleague.The film recreates the dramatic five days in 2023 when OpenAI's board fired CEO Sam Altman, only to reinstate him less than a week later.In this video, we explore why Amazon walked away from the project, why Netflix, A24 and several other studios also reportedly passed on it, and why the timing has sparked a much bigger debate about AI's growing influence in Hollywood.As AI companies become major investors, strategic partners and infrastructure providers for the entertainment industry, can studios still tell stories about those same companies without raising difficult questions about independence?The film may still find a home with Neon, but the conversation surrounding Artificial has already become almost as interesting as the movie itself.

articles.title: ‘Do not pick it up’: Actor Madhavan shares warning about poisonous seashell. It looks like a beautiful souvenir, but can be deadly
articles.description: Actor R Madhavan has issued a stark warning about collecting seashells, specifically cone snails. These seemingly beautiful souvenirs harbor a deadly secret: a harpoon-like tooth capable of injecting potent venom. Even empty shells can be dangerous, as the apparatus remains active and can inject paralyzing toxins if handled improperly. There is currently no known antivenom for these stings.

articles.title: 'Spider-Man: Brand New Day' final runtime revealed!
articles.description: Tom Holland's 'Spider-Man: Brand New Day' is set for a July release, with early reports suggesting a runtime of 2 hours and 24 minutes. This would make it the second-longest live-action Spider-Man film, just shy of 'No Way Home'. The synopsis hints at a transformed Peter Parker battling an unseen threat after the world forgets him. Directed by Destin Daniel Cretton, this marks Holland's fourth solo Spidey adventure.

articles.title: Why did LeBron James’ father Anthony McClelland leave him shortly after his birth? Inside his mother’s sacrifices that shaped his childhood
articles.description: LeBron James grew up without the support of his biological father, Anthony McClelland, who was absent throughout his childhood. His mother, Gloria James, raised him as a single parent despite financial struggles and constant challenges. With her support, along with help from trusted mentors, LeBron built the strong foundation that eventually helped him become one of basketball’s greatest players.

articles.title: Lock Upp 2: Shreya Kalra reveals Akanksha Chamola's big secret to Sufi Motiwala; says 'She's bi-se*ual'

This revelation follows Akanksha's public announcement of her divorce from Gaurav Khanna, who has been vocal about his unwavering love and support for her. Contestants are permitted to use such secrets strategically as 'lifelines' in the game.

articles.title: Anupam Kher mourns Vijaya Mehta: ‘She raised your standards’
articles.description: Veteran Indian theatre director, actor and filmmaker Vijaya Mehta passed away on Tuesday night due to age-related ailments. She was 91. Affectionately known as "Bai" in theatre circles, Mehta breathed her last at her residence in South Mumbai. Veteran actor Anupam Kher took to social media to mourn the loss of his mentor and collaborator.
